form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th on April 10 over 390m at Shepparton behind Princess Domi beaten 5 lengths (23.05) in a Grade 5. Fought on last time. Has the ability and right in the mix.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 3 over 400m at this track behind Warren's Ledger beaten 6 lengths (22.95). The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when third (17.05) at Healesville, making it two placings on end. Drawn close to the inside. Deserves respect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when third (17.05) at Healesville, making it two placings on end. Drawn close to the inside. Deserves respect.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 5 lengths over 390m at Shepparton in a handy (22.52), beating Jaicos. Will find this a bit tougher, prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at the last two runs, both at Ballarat, the latest when beaten 9 lengths behind Kensington Flyer over 390m. Likely to find this a bit tough.

formComments.comment: Has finished seventh at the last two runs, both at Ballarat, the latest when beaten 9 lengths behind Kensington Flyer over 390m. Likely to find this a bit tough.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when sixth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning three on end before placing two back. Looks a definite winning chance on best and given another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Eased on turn off back straight.

form.formComment: Returns from a four months spell after being tipped out on the back of a seventh (23.36) over 400m at this track. Looks one of the better hopes in the race.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 5th over 390m at Warrnambool beaten 2.5 lengths (22.93) behind Moraine Grace in a Grade 5 on April 9. Has ability and looks a winning hope.
